description: Harry Dewhirst discusses the concept of a decentralized network of sensors for capturing and monetizing real-world data through AI and blockchain technology. He shares his entrepreneurial journey, including his experiences with previous data businesses and the pivot to founding 375ai.
topic_summary: Exploration of 375ai's vision for a decentralized data network, the role of AI in processing real-world data, and insights from Harry Dewhirst's background in data monetization and entrepreneurship. Key topics include the importance of location data and the evolution of the business model from deploying existing technologies to creating proprietary solutions [t=18:24].
